positive: A mystical forest scene featuring geometric bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a gracefully glowing, stylized fox silhouette amidst delicate, interconnected fractal leaves and swirling nebulae patterns. The overall style is neo-art nouveau meets deep-space cyberpunk, rendered with strong, high-contrast linework and vibrant neon cyan, electric purple, and deep forest emerald accents. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centralized, designed for maximum visual impact on a wearable surface. Flat-graphic style, vector illustration, clean silhouette, highly detailed, glowing edges, perfect composition, print-ready, suitable for apparel print.
